semantic_review_disposition.reason: The implementation uses a mock Harbor HTTP server for validation and does not claim live runtime evidence. It validates trust-boundary inputs, rejects private evidence policy fields, strips session/snapshot passthrough override surfaces, maps duplicate run races to 409, confines Lode file reads with realpath, and records only refs/public state in Core.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: After fixing the reviewer findings, targeted API/Core checks and full workspace typecheck/test/lint passed at the reviewed head.
